reason: The OpenSC smart card tool can auto-detect smart card drivers; however, setting the smart card drivers in use by your organization helps to prevent users from using unauthorized smart cards. The default smart card driver for this profile is . To configure the OpenSC driver, edit the /etc/opensc.conf and add the following line into the file in the app default block, so it will look like: app default { ... card_drivers = ; }
estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Misconfiguration of smart card drivers could allow unauthorized smart card usage.
